name: @brainstorm-os/block-protocol
description: Transport-agnostic Block Protocol core for Brainstorm — the BP message envelope, the module router, and the hook-module router. Host bindings (e.g. the graph module → vault entities) live in the shell.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --outDir dist --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && node ../../scripts/prepare-publish.mjs block-protocol
